features: Google 'AQ.' API Key Support: Added full compatibility for Google's new service-account-bound 'AQ.' API key prefix format alongside the legacy 'AIza' format in all validation and command flows (applies to both v1.3 and v1.4).

Overloaded Key Logger Masking: Fixed a security leak in v1.3 where raw global API keys were printed in console rate-limit warnings; keys are now securely masked to show only the last 4 characters (e.g. '***xxxx').
